title: Getting Started with Next.js 16
excerpt: Learn how to build modern web applications with Next.js 16 and the new App Router features.
content: Next.js 16 brings exciting new features that make building web applications easier than ever. In this tutorial, we'll explore the new App Router, improved performance, and more.
author: Khanh Duy

title: Building Beautiful UIs with shadcn/ui
